seo.title: PrimaSTEM for Parents | Screen-Free Coding and Math Toy, Ages 4 to 10
seo.description: A wooden robot your child programs by hand, no screen, no apps. Teaches real coding and math through play, and grows with them from 4 to 10. Made in France, CE and UKCA certified. Available through our distributors.

hero.title: Real coding and math, by hand, no screen
hero.subtitle: A wooden robot, no app, that grows with your child from 4 to 10.
hero.price: Sold through distributors. Tell us where you are and we will point you to one.

sections.body:
Tokens on a wooden board - "forward," "turn right," "repeat 3 times." That's the program. The child sees it, touches it, rearranges it. Presses a button - the robot executes.

Something went wrong? Find the mistake, fix it, run again. The program is right there in front of them, so a child learns to sort it out alone, calmly, without the fear of getting it wrong.

**At 4–5:** Simple commands and numbers. Mazes on colorful maps. **At 6–7:** Functions and loops. "Instead of writing it five times - tell the robot: repeat." **At 8–10:** Mathematics. Precise angles, distances, arithmetic. Insert a marker - the robot draws stars, spirals, geometric patterns. And it doesn't stop at ten: with Scratch, older kids keep programming the robot with blocks.

sections.sidebarTitle: You don't have to be a teacher
sections.body:
You don't need to know how to code. The box includes a simple guided course for little ones: short activities, one small step at a time, with everything explained as you go.

When you want more, there are free printable activities online, and anything made for other classroom robots works here too.

sections.sidebarTitle: Programming you can put on the fridge
sections.body: The child programs. The robot draws. Real math, real art, real paper.

**Wood.** Not plastic.

**No screen.** No apps.

**It speaks.** Reads words aloud, names letters, even plays notes, in your language. Works before a child can read.

**It draws.** Stars, spirals, hearts, with a precision a plain rolling robot can't match.

**One purchase.** Everything's in the box, with no paid add-ons.

**Made in France.** CE + UKCA certified.

cta.title: Bring PrimaSTEM home
cta.subtitle: Complete kit. Sold through distributors. Tell us where you are and we will point you to one.
